summary: Backend 22/23 pass (95%); 1 failure exposes season filter bug. Frontend home/stats/sleepers/login/profile/rankings builder all rendering & integrating correctly with cookie auth.

critical.issue: Season filter not strict: when a player has no row for the requested season, _attach_current_season falls back to most recent season instead of excluding the player. Result: season=2023 returns 72 items including 2024 rows.

minor.issue: Returns {count, items} envelope; consumers must unwrap. Acceptable but not documented in request spec which implied flat list.

action_items: Fix season filter in /app/backend/server.py _attach_current_season: when season is provided and no matching row exists, exclude the player (return None) instead of falling back to max season.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py _attach_current_season silently falls back to most-recent season when requested season missing - violates filter contract.

CORS_ORIGINS='*' in backend/.env while cookies use samesite=none+secure=true; combination works only because FastAPI middleware likely echoes origin, but explicit FRONTEND_URL allowlist would be safer.
Player list returns {count, items}; consider documenting or unifying with other list endpoints.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Player_A via CSV upload; created+deleted TEST_Ranking via API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Players API returns {count, items}. Rankings schema is {title, scoring, player_ids, notes} — NOT picks/name/league_size. Auth uses httpOnly cookies; pytest requests.Session preserves them. Outlook generation works with real Claude (~5s). Season filter bug confirmed — exposed by TestPlayers.test_filter_season.
rca of the issue: Season filter bug: server.py:131-139 _attach_current_season() does `if cur is None and seasons: cur = max(...)`. Fix: when `season` arg was explicitly passed and no row matched, return None and let the caller filter (line 170 already drops players with no current_season). Repro: GET /api/players?season=2023 returns players whose current_season.season == 2024.
